description: Invoice exceeds the $15,000.00 monthly fee cap.

clause_ref.text: Customer shall pay Vendor a monthly services fee not to exceed Fifteen Thousand U.S. Dollars ($15,000) per calendar month for analytics support.

evidence: Billed $17,500.00 vs $15,000.00 monthly cap — $2,500.00 over limit.

description: Invoice submitted without a purchase order reference.

clause_ref.text: Vendor shall reference a valid Harbor purchase order number on every invoice submitted for payment.

description: Invoice date falls outside the contract term.

clause_ref.text: This Agreement is effective January 1, 2025 and expires December 31, 2025, unless earlier terminated per Section 8.
Vendor shall not submit duplicate invoices for the same billing period or invoice number.
